summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled for this job. Security-sensitive linked refs are routed individually; open candidate PRs are kept open or sent to human review only where the artifact shows an unresolved maintainer/proof/review decision.
